summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TemaDom Bulgarian construction marketplace including price calculator, portfolio functionality, and user authentication flows
passed_tests: Categories endpoint returns 15 construction service categories
Stats endpoint provides correct data structure
Client and company authentication/login works correctly
Company profile and company listing endpoints
TemaDom homepage loads with proper branding
Calculator page loads and displays all 12 service categories
Calculator calculates prices correctly with regional variations (tested Plovdiv vs Sofia)
Calculator shows quality level options (Economy, Standard, Premium)
Calculator pricing type selection (Labor-only vs Labor+Materials)
Login/Registration flow works for both clients and companies
Project listing page displays projects correctly
Company listing page shows registered companies
Company detail pages load with reviews section
Registration form with client/company tab switching

success_percentage.backend: 95% (35/37 tests passed - only expected registration failures due to existing test users)
